habitat: Tropical Africa origin; major drinks culture in Egypt (karkadeh), West Africa, Caribbean, Mexico (jamaica).
traditionalUsesEn: Tart caffeine-free beverage; traditional cooling drink; studied for mild blood-pressure effects in some trials.
traditionalUsesDe: Säuerliches koffeinfreies Getränk; traditionell kühlend; in Studien teils bei Blutdruck untersucht.
cautions: May lower blood pressure—monitor if on antihypertensives. Food use generally safe.
historicalNotes: Global diaspora beverage from African domesticates.
